reviews.title: Bugs everywhere.
reviews.text: There were bugs in the bed. In the floor. In the hot pot. The shower. The drains. Room doesn’t come w Netflix as listed as well as none of the amenities listed except WiFi were in the room. They also don’t clean the room. They refused to change me to a room without bugs. I can’t even believe they are allowed to rent this room as I couldn’t even stay there because I didn’t want to sleep with bugs on me from the bed. DO NOT STAY HERE!
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text: Do not visit. A big scam. Dirty. Smelly. Infested. I had to check out early due to problems
reviews.room_type: Sea View Family Apartment

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: flc sea tower
reviews.room_type: Sea View Family Apartment

reviews.title: The view of Quy Nhon Beach from the high floor is amazing.
reviews.text: The room is spacious and there are too many empty areas on the floor, but the view is excellent. Unlike regular hotels, the style here involves contacting the manager from the building's reception, who brings the key. Since I had an early departure, I left the key and a note at the empty reception and checked out.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Nice to stay long-term
reviews.text: I would recommend this apartment because the location is good. There're many of bar and restaurants near by and only take 5 min to city center.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: That's too bad~
reviews.text:
The accommodation has a good location and is decent, but I believe they need to pay more attention to cleaning. 

There were many cobwebs on the ceiling, mold in the bathroom, and too many ants. 

Also, the water pressure was too weak; I wonder if that is normal~~~~ㅠㅠ 

During my 7-night stay, even though I didn't eat anything indoors, ants would crawl on me while I was sleeping ㅠㅠ 

For those who are staying long-term, it's important to know that although it's a condotel, you should not expect additional cleaning services or supplies like water, toilet paper, or towels. 

Still, it was nice to have a washing machine, but there is no drying rack. 

The staff are friendly, but the cleaning is really disappointing. There's a big difference between being old and not being well-maintained. That's what makes it disappointing.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Okay.
reviews.text: The room is temporarily okay, with an induction stove and a washing machine, suitable for budget travel or a short stay before continuing on, located near the beach. There are too many guests around noon and in the afternoon, and even with 5 elevators, the wait is long. Note: finding a parking spot is very difficult. Parking in the basement costs 30k/hour.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Family Apartment

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: When booking, I received information that there was parking available for cars, but when I arrived, there was no parking. My car had to go elsewhere and incurred a fee of 100k per night.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is fine. However, everyone should consider parking. The apartment has parking space in the basement but charges by the hour. On average, the parking fee for one day is over a hundred thousand VND.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and has a spacious balcony. In the picture, there is one bed, but in fact, there are two. It is fully equipped and located in the center, close to entertainment spots.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: FLC-
reviews.text: Every time I go to Quy Nhon, I always stay here.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Family Apartment

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon
reviews.text: I had a wonderful vacation at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon. The apartment is spacious, modern, and fully equipped, especially with a beautiful sea view. Convenient location, close to the beach and attractions. Friendly service, enthusiastic staff. Everything was perfect, I will come back next time!
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Amazing experience
reviews.text:
I just had a wonderful vacation at the FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon and want to share my feelings. The apartment has an extremely convenient location, close to the beach with a beautiful sea view, providing a great relaxing space. It only takes a few minutes to walk to the famous attractions of Quy Nhon.

The apartment is designed modernly, spacious, clean, and fully equipped with amenities like a washing machine, refrigerator, flat-screen TV, and air conditioning. The large balcony allows you to enjoy the fresh air and the sea view.

The amenities at FLC Sea Tower are excellent with an infinity pool, gym, and spa, along with a restaurant serving delicious food. The service here is also very professional and friendly, with staff always ready to assist when needed.

I am very satisfied with my stay at FLC Sea Tower and will definitely come back next time. This is the ideal choice for those who want to enjoy a quiet and luxurious vacation in Quy Nhon.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Excellent Stay at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon!
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience staying at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon. From the moment I arrived, I was impressed by the hotel’s modern architecture and prime location. Situated by the sea, it offers breathtaking views of the coastline, which made my stay even more enjoyable.

The room was spacious, clean, and well-equipped with all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The bed was extremely comfortable, and the bathroom was spotless with high-quality toiletries. I particularly enjoyed the balcony where I could relax and admire the ocean view.

The staff at FLC Sea Tower were friendly and attentive. They made check-in and check-out smooth and were always ready to assist with any inquiries or requests. Their customer service was top-notch.

The hotel facilities are also excellent. The swimming pool overlooking the sea was perfect for a refreshing dip, and the gym was well-maintained. I didn’t get a chance to try the restaurant, but I heard good things about the food from other guests.

Location-wise, FLC Sea Tower is very convenient, with many restaurants and cafes nearby. It’s also just a short drive to the main attractions in Quy Nhon, making it an ideal base for exploring the city.

Overall, my stay at FLC Sea Tower Quy Nhon was amazing, and I would highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area. I look forward to staying here again in the future!
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: An amazing experience at FLC Sea Tower Hotel - Worth every penny!
reviews.text:
I just had a wonderful vacation at FLC Sea Tower and I couldn't be more satisfied with this choice. The hotel is in a very convenient location, right by the beach and close to famous tourist attractions in the city. The surrounding space is extremely quiet and airy, providing an absolutely relaxing feeling.

The rooms at FLC Sea Tower are very modern and fully equipped. I especially liked the design of the room, which is both luxurious and very cozy. Every morning when I woke up, I could enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the beautiful sea from the window, a truly memorable experience. The bed is very comfortable, the large bathtub, and amenities like TV, air conditioning, and minibar are all functioning well.

Especially, the service here is excellent. The staff is very attentive and friendly, always ready to assist when needed. I felt warmly welcomed right from the moment I stepped into the hotel. The reception staff is always cheerful and answers all my questions about activities around the city.

Breakfast at FLC Sea Tower is extremely abundant and delicious. The dishes are freshly prepared, especially the local seafood which is very fresh and appealing. Other facilities like the infinity pool and gym are also fantastic, helping me relax after a day of sightseeing.

In summary, FLC Sea Tower is a perfect choice for those looking for a luxurious resort, excellent service, and an ideal resting space. I will definitely return on my next trips and recommend it to my friends!
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: The room is beautiful and clean.
reviews.text: I went on a business trip, checked in quickly, the staff was friendly and enthusiastic, and the location is right in the city center, convenient for commuting.
reviews.room_type: Sea View King Room with Balcony

reviews.title: 호스트 연락 잘 안됨. 베트남어 필수.
reviews.text:
호스트와 연결이 잘 안 돼서 매우 어려웠습니다. 영어는 못 하고 베트남어로만 소통이 가능한 것 같습니다. 영어를 하니 그냥 전화를 끊어 버리더라고요.
얼리 체크인한다니까 아고다에는 공지가 없었던 20만 동을 더 내어야 하였습니다.
근데 아고다 앱에서 보았던 방이 아닌 랜덤으로 배정된 방을 이용해야 한다고 하네요.
3명의 가족이 4박하는 동안 큰 수건 4장과 작은 수건 4장으로 버텨야 하였습니다. 휴지와 수건을 리필해 달라는 메시지는 아무런 반응이 없더군요.
여행 내내 기분이 썩 좋지 않았습니다.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Family Apartment
